# Cleanroom HVAC Integration and Pressure Cascade Commissioning: Aligning Equipment Performance with Facility Systems

## 适用受众
Project_Manager

## 写作角度说明
生物安全设备从来不是独立运行的——它需要与 HVAC 系统协同工作才能维持正确的压差梯度。HVAC 与气密设备的联动调试是现场最常见返工点，也是项目经理最需要提前介入的关键环节。本角度帮助项目经理解析 HVAC 联动调试的核心要点，避免因系统集成问题导致验收失败。

## 核心论点 / 洞察
HVAC-integrated commissioning—where differential pressure control meets air change rate management—exposes the gap between equipment specification and real-world system performance, a gap that experienced project managers learn to close before it becomes a costly punch-list item.

## 参考素材
- HVAC fundamentals for project managers: air change rate (ACH), pressure cascade logic, supply/exhaust balance
- Pressure setpoint coordination: room-to-room gradients (≥15Pa per ISO 14644-1), door cycle transient response
- HVAC commissioning sequence: static pressure balancing before equipment energizing, dynamic balancing after
- Door cycle impact analysis: pressure recovery time after door opening, exhaust flow adjustment requirements
- Airlock cycling effects: multiple door sequences impact on zone pressure stability, worst-case scenarios
- BMS setpoint management: adjusting pressure targets based on HVAC load conditions, seasonal variations
- Common integration failures: undersized exhaust fans, ductwork bypass leakage, damper control lag
- Commissioning documentation: HVAC balancing reports, pressure profiles, equipment start-up logs
- Interdisciplinary sign-off: mechanical contractor vs. electrical contractor vs. equipment supplier responsibility matrix

## 关键词
HVAC Integration, Pressure Cascade, Air Change Rate, Differential Pressure, Cleanroom Commissioning, BMS Setpoint, Multi-Disciplinary Coordination, System Integration, Pressure Recovery
